title: Customer
description: Commerce v1 customer reference contract for order, quote, channel, and customer memory linkage without embedding sensitive profile details.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05 customer memory boundaries and TECH-04 customer/order runtime. TODO: source documents do not define full customer master data schema or PII handling fields.

customer_code.description: Optional customer code if assigned by source system.

display_name.description: Safe display name. Do not expose private data publicly.

memory_allowed.description: Whether customer memory may be used under source privacy policy.

privacy_flags.description: Privacy flags. TODO: define official privacy taxonomy.
